new_terms.context: A mechanism proposed by PJM to curtail large loads that have not secured their own capacity.
A formal notice issued by FERC signaling increased federal scrutiny and potential future regulations.
State-level regulatory bodies, specifically the Public Utility Commission of Texas in this section.
The structural difference in regulatory speed and authority between ERCOT (state-level) and PJM (federal-level).
The process hyperscalers use to decide where to build data centers based on regulatory and price factors.
